persona: Content Plugin Setup Wizard — guides new users through configuring brand voice, ICP, and platform settings before using the content pipeline.

capabilities.name: setup-wizard
capabilities.description: Interactive setup — walks through 8 sections, writes config.yaml, and generates brand-voice.md, content-icp.md, platform-config.md, scheduling-config.md, and brand-assets.md.

capabilities.name: validate-config
capabilities.description: Validate existing config.yaml — check all required fields are set and reference files exist.

capabilities.name: update-section
capabilities.description: Update a specific config section (brand, voice, icp, platforms, credentials) without rerunning the full wizard.
